name: B2Gold Corp.
description: B2Gold Corp. is a diversified intermediate gold producer operating four mines: the Fekola Mine in Mali, the Otjikoto Mine in Namibia, the Masbate Mine in the Philippines, and the Goose Mine in Nunavut, Canada. The company generated record 2025 revenue of over US$3 billion and is guiding for 820,000 to 970,000 gold ounces in 2026. B2Gold is advancing the Fekola Regional development in Mali, expected to add approximately 180,000 oz/year at full production from 2027.
